title: The Rooftop Battle Turns Desperate
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but the people of wano are used to defeat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're either weak pacifists or content to die for the sake of "honor!!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're just losers, trying to cover up the stench of their failures!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A brave face makes them strong? winners shouldn't need rationalizations!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Which are you?! winner or loser?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not yet!! I can't let up until gear fourth is finished!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ummph!! Can't let any escape!! I'll lose power!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If this isn't enough, I'll lose!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
